  2. 【立即】校对买卖点信息

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📈 Excel文件内容说明

  每个Excel文件包含4个Sheet页:

  【Sheet1: 交易摘要】
    显示整体统计:
      • 股票代码和数据范围
      • 交易总数、总收益、平均收益、胜率

  【Sheet2: 交易清单】⭐ 用于校对
    所有买卖点明细:
      序号 | 股票代码 | 买入日期 | 买入时间 | 买入价 |
      卖出日期 | 卖出时间 | 卖出价 | 持有天数 | 收益率% | 状态
    
    颜色标注:
      🟢 绿色 = 盈利交易（收益率% > 0）
      🔴 红色 = 亏损交易（收益率% < 0）

  【Sheet3: 信号点详情】⭐ 用于验证条件
    所有满足条件的交易点:
      日期 | 收盘价 | MA5 | MA30 | 成交量 | MA20均量 |
      MA30向上? | 量能放大? | 5日线回踩? | BUY | SELL

    条件说明:
      • MA30向上: MA30 > 前一天的MA30
      • 量能放大: 成交量 > MA20均量 × 2倍
      • 5日线回踩: 收盘价 < MA5

  【Sheet4: 策略参数】
    本次回测的参数配置:
      • MA周期、量能倍数、持有天数等

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

    ImportError: No module named 'efinance'

  解决:
    pip install efinance

  问题: 获取数据为空
  ──────────────────
  原因:
    • 股票代码错误（应是6位如"000001"）
    • 日期范围无交易日（如周末）
    • 股票停牌

  验证:
    python test_efinance.py

Bash(cd "D:\\ai_work\\stock_test" && python3 << 'EOF'
import sys
import json
from app_with_cache import app

# Create a test client
client = app.test_client\(\)

# Test 1: Default API call \(as from frontend\)
print\("=" * 60\)
print\("TEST 1: API call with trading settings \(from frontend\)"\)
print\("=" * 60\)

request_data = {
    'symbols': ['000001'],
    'initial_capital': 100000,
    'position_ratio': 0.2,
    'commission_rate': 0.0001,
    'slippage': 0
}

response = client.post\('/api/backtest/cache', 
    data=json.dumps\(request_data\),
    content_type='application/json'\)

result = response.get_json\(\)
print\(f"Status: {response.status_code}"\)
print\(f"Success: {result.get\('success'\)}"\)
print\(f"Total trades: {result.get\('total_trades'\)}"\)
print\(f"Total return: {result.get\('total_return'\)}%"\)

# Test 2: Minimal API call \(without trading settings\)
print\("\\n" + "=" * 60\)
print\("TEST 2: API call without trading settings"\)
print\("=" * 60\)

request_data_minimal = {
    'symbols': ['000001']
}

response2 = client.post\('/api/backtest/cache', 
    data=json.dumps\(request_data_minimal\),
    content_type='application/json'\)

result2 = response2.get_json\(\)
print\(f"Status: {response2.status_code}"\)
print\(f"Success: {result2.get\('success'\)}"\)
print\(f"Total trades: {result2.get\('total_trades'\)}"\)
print\(f"Total return: {result2.get\('total_return'\)}%"\)

# Test 3: Check if both return same results
print\("\\n" + "=" * 60\)
print\("COMPARISON"\)
print\("=" * 60\)
print\(f"Test 1 total_trades == Test 2 total_trades: {result.get\('total_trades'\) == result2.get\('total_trades'\)}"\)
print\(f"Test 1 total_return == Test 2 total_return: {result.get\('total_return'\) == result2.get\('total_return'\)}"\)

# Test 4: Multiple stocks
print\("\\n" + "=" * 60\)
print\("TEST 4: Multiple stocks \(using cache\)"\)
print\("=" * 60\)

# First, let's check what stocks are available
response_cache = client.get\('/api/cache/status'\)
cache_data = response_cache.get_json\(\)

if cache_data.get\('success'\):
    available_symbols = [log['symbol'] for log in cache_data.get\('update_logs', []\)][:5]
    print\(f"Available symbols: {available_symbols}"\)
    
    if available_symbols:
        request_multi = {
            'symbols': available_symbols
        }
        
        response_multi = client.post\('/api/backtest/cache',
            data=json.dumps\(request_multi\),
            content_type='application/json'\)
        
        result_multi = response_multi.get_json\(\)
        print\(f"Status: {response_multi.status_code}"\)
        print\(f"Success: {result_multi.get\('success'\)}"\)
        print\(f"Total trades: {result_multi.get\('total_trades'\)}"\)
        print\(f"Stocks tested: {result_multi.get\('stocks_tested'\)}"\)
        print\(f"Total return: {result_multi.get\('total_return'\)}%"\)

EOF)
